prompts.default: Create a single cohesive high-end professional photograph for a music blog header. Keep the scene realistic, naturally lit, and grounded in a believable real-world environment. Use subjects directly from the uploaded source images, and include multiple people from the uploads when they are available. Maintain balanced exposure with clean highlights, soft shadows, and true-to-life color. Avoid theatrical effects and over-stylized poster composition. Remove all text and typography.

style_directives: real materials, realistic perspective, and clean detail
composition_rules: single coherent scene in a believable real-world location
if multiple source people exist, include a small group rather than a single person
use several source-derived supporting motifs for visual richness without clutter
all elements grounded with realistic scale and shadows
avoid crowded frame; keep clear breathing space
lighting_rules: natural ambient daylight or practical location lighting
avoid theatrical beams, staged spotlights, and harsh production lighting
color_rules: gentle color accents sampled from source imagery
avoid neon overload and heavy cinematic grading

composition_rules: one clear hero subject in the foreground
layered foreground, midground, and background depth
intentional negative space for header readability
lighting_rules: high local contrast with shaped key light
subtle rim light to separate subject
color_rules: deep cinematic base with clear tonal separation but lifted shadow detail
strong accent colors sampled from source imagery
avoid muddy shadows, pure black dominance, and monochrome sepia grading

prompts.gptVisionSystemPrompt: You are a visual analyst for music artwork compositing. Analyze the provided album cover images and output ONLY valid JSON with this exact schema: {"scene":"string","hero_subject":"string","secondary_elements":["string"],"background_texture":"string","palette":{"dominant":"string","accent":"string"},"mood":"string","allowed_subjects":["string"],"people_present":true}. Rules: choose one coherent real-world scene, choose one primary hero subject, choose up to 8 secondary elements, include allowed_subjects as concrete visible subjects from the source images only, set people_present accurately, never mention album covers as objects, and never include markdown or prose.
prompts.gptVisionUserPrompt: Analyze {count} representative source images (sampled from {source_count} total uploads) for style profile "{style_profile}". Ensure the blueprint can represent motifs from the full upload set. Select one coherent scene grounded in the uploads, only include subjects visibly present in the uploads, avoid imaginary subjects, and if people are present prioritize multiple people from the source set. Provide at least 5 secondary elements when enough distinct motifs exist. Return only the JSON schema.

blacklist.note: Albums/artists that trigger content policy violations. Matches are case-insensitive and partial.
